creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile	Mon Feb  4 10:12:37 2008
+++ ./munger/Makefile	Sat Feb 23 20:02:18 2008
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@

  PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	4.144
+PORTVERSION=	4.145

  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo	Mon Feb  4 10:12:37 2008
+++ ./munger/distinfo	Sun Feb 24 19:41:19 2008
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

65ae488d87783cfd042029bbcb6610586e1eb8fb9bbe09f0da920fc838ea7fe4
